entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Frost Mage DPS in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Frost Mage DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Ice Lance (once learned after level 66) if your target is frozen.

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Frost Mage DPS in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Always create food & water before questing . This may seem obvious, but there's nothing worse than going to quest, running out of Mana, and spending ages crafting refreshments, drinking, crafting more, etc., until you finally have a full stack.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Take advantage of AoE opportunities . As a Mage, your area-of-effect damage potential is huge. With spells like Flamestrike , Cone of Cold , and Frost Nova , taking down groups of monsters is an easy task.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Don't forget about Polymorph - Polymorph is easily one of the best crowd control tools in the game. You can turn the tide of any fight very easily, and good use of it will make your leveling much smoother.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Use your cooldowns . Every Mage spec has cooldowns in its talent tree. Saving them for an emergency might seem like a good idea, but they have a few minutes of cooldown at most, so make sure to use them as often as possible!

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Remember to visit the trainer . Throughout your whole journey from 1-70, you should always remember to visit your trainer! Increasing the rank of key spells like Frostbolt at 63, and Ice Lance at 66 is vital for maximizing your leveling speed.

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Frost Mage DPS in TBC Classic
